verse_text: for it is God who works in you both to will and to do for His good pleasure.

links.context: , 3 Great things were accomplished when the children of Israel freely submitted their will to the will of God. Two wills worked in synergy to build the tabernacle--the human will of the people freely willing the same thing as the divine will. Great things are also accomplished in the Church when both wills work in synergy ([[PHP.2:13]]).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
